expectedBehavior: Demonstrates the full session lifecycle with three new ACP session management APIs. Part 1 creates three sessions (two with the current working directory, one with /tmp). Part 2 lists all sessions (3 total), then filters by cwd showing 2 in the project directory and 1 in /tmp. Part 3 resumes session 1 without replaying conversation history (contrast with loadSession in module-09 which replays). Part 4 closes session 3 and verifies it was removed by listing again (3 to 2). Part 5 closes the remaining sessions and confirms 0 remain.
